src: Big image viewer supporting pan and zoom, with very little memory usage and full featured image loading choices. Powered by Subsampling Scale Image View, Fresco, Glide, and Picasso. Even with gif and webp support! 🍻
ja: パンとズームに対応した大きな画像ビューワー。メモリ使用量が非常に少なく、豊富な画像読み込みオプションを提供。Subsampling Scale Image View・Fresco・Glide・Picassoを活用。GIFやWebPもサポート！🍻
